scripts.validatemodel: node -e "import('node:fs').then(f=>{const s=f.statSync('public/models/htdemucs_6s/htdemucs_6s_fp16weights.onnx');const mb=s.size/1024/1024;if(mb<50){console.error('ERROR: Model file is only '+mb.toFixed(1)+'MB — expected ~136MB. Likely a Git LFS pointer. Run: pnpm run download:model -- --small-only --local <path>');process.exit(1)}else{console.log('Model OK: '+mb.toFixed(1)+' MB')}}).catch(e=>{console.error('No model file found. Run download:model or copy manually.');process.exit(0)})"
scripts.prebuild: pnpm run generate:templates && node scripts/copy-ort-wasm.mjs && pnpm run validatemodel
